settings.subtext: Honest servicing, repairs and quality second-hand parts. Servicing Sunshine West and Melbourne's western suburbs.
settings.trust_items: All Makes & Models | Log Book Servicing | Warranty Safe | Second-Hand Parts

settings.heading: Proper Mechanical Work, Done Locally
settings.body1: Niche Automotive is a Sunshine West workshop built on honest advice and quality workmanship. From routine log book servicing to full engine rebuilds, we look after all makes and models, treating every car like it's our own.
settings.body2: Alongside our workshop, we stock a growing range of quality second-hand parts. So whether you need to book a service or track down a hard-to-find part, you're in the right place.
settings.points: All makes & models | Fixed, upfront pricing | Warranty-safe servicing | Honest advice, every time

settings.title: Local, Honest, Done Right
settings.copy: A Sunshine West workshop built on straight answers and quality work. Whether you are booking a service or hunting a hard-to-find part, you get honest advice and a fair price every time.
settings.points: All makes & models | Fixed, upfront pricing | Warranty-safe servicing | Quality second-hand parts

settings.question: What areas do you service?
settings.answer: We're based in Sunshine West and look after customers right across Melbourne's western suburbs.

settings.question: Do you work on all makes and models?
settings.answer: Yes. From daily drivers to weekend projects, we service and repair all makes and models.

settings.question: Will a service affect my new car warranty?
settings.answer: No. Our log book servicing follows the manufacturer's schedule, so your new car warranty stays intact.

settings.question: Do you sell second-hand parts?
settings.answer: Yes. We stock a growing range of quality second-hand parts and can help track down hard-to-find items.

settings.question: Do you give upfront pricing?
settings.answer: Always. We provide clear, upfront quotes before any work starts, so there are no surprises.

settings.question: How do I book my car in?
settings.answer: Give us a call on 0411 019 935 or send an enquiry through the contact form and we'll get you sorted.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.intro: Everything you need to know before you book your car in or shop the parts store.
settings.cta_text: Still have a question? Call us on

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.

settings.text: New parts land regularly. Get the drop when fresh stock hits the store.
